context_summary: Delta da hoan thanh toan bo frontend Phase 1. Next.js 14 app chay duoc tren port 3000, build thanh cong khong loi. UI bao gom: sidebar session list, chat area voi SSE streaming, upload page voi drag-drop. KHONG bao gom (theo yeu cau Phase 1): mode switch, source citation, feedback buttons.

technical_details.sse_implementation: fetch + ReadableStream (khong dung EventSource vi can POST)

acceptance_criteria_status.next_js_14_port_3000: Done - npm run dev chay tren port 3000
acceptance_criteria_status.session_sidebar: Done - list sessions, create new session
acceptance_criteria_status.connect_backend: Ready - API client da cau hinh, cho backend chay

notes: De chay: cd frontend && npm run dev. Backend can chay tren port 8000. Next.js rewrite da cau hinh de proxy /api/v1/* den backend.

_completion.notes: Phase 1 frontend ACCEPTED. Full end-to-end flow: upload PDF -> chat -> stream response da verified.
